payload.additional_notes: Framed sailboat painting dominates left foreground. Open doorway on right leads to adjacent room. Small seating area with lamps visible down the hall beside stairs.
payload.image_summary: Interior hallway view with framed art on the left, a wall clock and hanging flag on the right, an open door, and a small seating area with table lamps near a staircase at the far end.
